svg.text: India's Enterprise Dependency Index, layer by variable
Every layer scored 0–10 on seven variables; the weighted sum is the EDI. Higher = deeper dependency.
Source: Techadyant Labs EDI model (see Appendix A). Inputs hardened from primary sources.
Variables: SC Strategic Criticality · SD Switching Difficulty · FO Foreign Ownership · DC Domestic-Capability Deficit · GE Geopolitical Exposure · SE Security Exposure · VC Vendor Concentration
